title: wedelia humilis
intro: Wedelia humilis, also known as the creeping oxeye or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Wedelia humilis has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its medicinal properties, although its efficacy and safety should be evaluated under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
